meaning: n.贝壳,壳,外形,炮弹vt.去壳,脱落,炮轰vi.剥落,脱壳 [计] 设定命令行解释器的位置
examples: A snail's shell is spiral in form.
The animal retracted into its shell.
The men were suffering from shell shock.
Shell aims to combine coal gasification with gas-to-diesel technology in an alliance with coal miner Anglo American.
Start with the spicy fried soft shell crab and juicy morsels of grilled beef wrapped in betel leaves.
